diffCoverage.notes: restore_sessions orchestrates store (load/decrypt) + zalo (login/listen) via session (SessionManager) from the command layer; forward-only order preserved.

findings.evidence: restore_sessions reads from the store layer (load_accounts/mark_reauth_needed), reuses the shared login_and_listen path (zalo + session layers), and returns non-secret AccountProfile DTOs. It is command-layer orchestration over lower layers — no backward dependency, no zca-rust above zalo. After session-manager, sessions register via SessionManager.

summary: Architecture review (reconciliation): startup auto-restore is command-layer orchestration over store + zalo + session through the shared login_and_listen path; forward-only layering holds and no secret types rise into command. Approve.
